## Summary

## Model validation

- Baseline/candidate versions:
- Immutable evidence and seeds:
- Precommitted gate result:
- Promotion/non-promotion decision:

## Software tests

- Unit/parity/replay checks:
- Commands and results:

## Publication checks

- Targeted render:
- Internal-browser console/mobile/light/dark/accessibility:
- Scoped article namespaces rendered:
- Pre-push gate (`scoped_publication_gate` or `full_publication_gate`):
- Full-site rationale (required only for `full_publication_gate`):
- Outside/shared Civitas paths and authorization or PR-branch exception:

## Repository order

- [ ] Publication commit/push precedes parent submodule pointer
- [ ] Explicit paths staged; unrelated changes excluded
